{{Expand}}

{{Infobox concept
| name = Grade Six anomalies
| introduced = Soulsmith
}}

== Soulsmith ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|There are four hundred sixty-two [[Grade Six anomalies]].<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c5">''Soulsmith'', chapter 5</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:Soulsmith]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle concepts]]
